posts.cookedHtml:
- WEBINAR -
Date: August 26th, 2025
Time: 10am PDT / 1pm EDT
Sign Up Link: https://bit.ly/475K8FA

monday.com PSA (Professional Services Automation) Webinar with Kolme Group1200×627 55.9 KB

Is Your Team Outgrowing Spreadsheets?

Scaling too fast without the right processes can lead to scattered time tracking, delayed invoicing, and unclear resource forecasts.

Join Kolme Group for a live webinar where founder and PSA expert, Matt Henderson will show you how monday.com PSA can help professional services teams regain control and scale effectively.

What you’ll learn:

  • The tipping point: When spreadsheets stop working for PS teams
  • How to streamline time tracking, invoicing, and resource utilization in one platform
  • Real-world example: How a Kolme client improved project margins
  • Live demo of key PSA dashboards

Register now to secure your spot!

Bonus: Attendees will receive a free PSA readiness checklist to assess their workflows.

Don’t miss this opportunity to see how monday.com PSA can transform your operations.

*Have questions? Please email us at ppmanswers@kolmegroup.com
